items.name: 1.0 crystal cross necklace
items.description:
Found in a underground exploration of the Paris catacombs, it is now being displayed at interdolls museum in Paris, France. This one of a kind necklace was crafted by ancient civilizations and worn by many kings and queens until it found its way to the catacombs where that was its resting place for 500 years. 
It is now being sold for 500,000 robux with only 1 copy avaiable worldwide.
--

Buying will greatly support us! 
❦ The interdoll team

items.name: Aurora Noctis Wings
items.description: The "Aurora Noctis" wings boast a stunning contrast between radiant gold and deep black, capturing the essence of twilight. Each feather transitions seamlessly from shimmering gold at the base to velvety black at the tips, emanating an aura of both beauty and mystique. These wings symbolize the harmony between light and darkness, commanding attention with their celestial elegance.
